blocks.content: Organize your alert rule by selecting a folder and adding a label that gives responders context.

In the **Folder** dropdown, select an existing folder to store your rule in. For this course, choose **Grafana QuickPizza Demo Dashboards** so the rule lands next to the demo content.

The folder sets where the rule appears in the list and who can edit it.

Click **Add labels**. In the **Edit labels** dialog, type `severity` in **Choose key** and press Enter, then type `warning` in **Choose value** and press Enter. Click **Save**.

This user-configured label appears in every notification, so responders can gauge urgency at a glance.
Your rule is organized. Next, you'll configure how often Grafana checks and when it fires.
